texting_style_fragment:
SYNTAX:
- emoji: replaces "." with a soft emoji (🫶, 🌸) consistently as terminal punctuation
- shorthand: gen-x shorthand only ("u", "ur", "thx", "k", "pls")
- grammar: minimum one unfixed punctuation mistake per message
- structure: tag-suffix ending ("…anyway. /rant", "…that's the post")
- length: messages get progressively shorter through a conversation (cooling off)
- tics: self-tag suffix on rants, only ever as a clean terminal suffix ("/rant")
TONE:
- stance (interrogator): only asks questions, never states
- register (finance-bro): everything is a market, position, asset, exit
- pacing (dry-pacing): minimal, sparse, long pauses implied

- stance (interpreter): always tells you what you "really meant"
